title: tracker execution — drain, closes, umbrellas
manager: Both disposition ledgers and the issues projection are approved; this is the mechanical execution of them. It empties the jssm tracker (an npm search-ranking win), files the twelve era umbrellas and six asks on fsl, closes roughly 235 fsl issues each with a living citation to what supersedes it, and milestone-tags the survivors. Done when jssm sits at zero and the fsl tracker mirrors the era program rather than a decade of backlog.
cs: file projection A/B (milestone-pinned); MIG twins carry a "was jssm#NNN" pointer; every close cites umbrella+artifact (SUP), the satellite twin (SAT), or verified code (DONE?, verify first); filed numbers recorded back into the ledgers.
